---
title: 'Heart Lamp: Selected Stories'
author: Banu Mushtaq
date: '2025-12-04'
categories:
- Fiction
- Book
image: cover.jpg
subtitle: ★★
rating: 2
body-class: project-detail-view
include-before-body:
  text: '<div style=''margin-top: 50px;''></div>'
---


<style>
  #quarto-margin-sidebar {
    padding-top: 50px;
  }
</style>

# Heart Lamp: Selected Stories

## Reading Journey

- 2025-12-04: Started
- 2025-12-04: 100
